scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy

FOLIO_ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Editor admin token — gates /admin in single-tenant (token) mode. Use a long random string.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL.description: Public site URL for OG images + canonical links, e.g. https://your-folio.workers.dev

NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY.description: PostHog project API key (optional) — enables folio_page_view / folio_link_click analytics.

FOLIO_FAVICON.description: "on" (default) self-hosts favicons for non-brand links; set "off" to disable third-party fetch.

ALMANAC_URL.description: Optional — base URL of your Almanac deploy for full click→signup→revenue attribution.

ALMANAC_API_KEY.description: Optional — Almanac API key (x-api-key); set together with ALMANAC_URL.
